prs.title: Biggest out of 5
prs.body:
Pull Request: Find Largest Number out of 5 (C++ Program)

Summary:
Added a C++ program that takes five input values from the user and determines the largest among them using conditional statements (if, else if, else).

Changes Made:
Declared five float variables (a, b, c, d, e) for user input.
Used sequential if-else if conditions to compare all five numbers.
Ensured only one result is displayed — the largest number.
Improved efficiency and readability compared to multiple independent if statements.

prs.title: Pagani Huayra
prs.body:
Created a new HTML page pagani-huayra.html featuring details about the Pagani Huayra hypercar. The page maintains the same layout and styling as the existing car detail pages for consistency.

Changes Made:
Added pagani-huayra.html file with structured sections for the title, image, specifications, and description.
Updated image reference to pagani.png.
Revised content to highlight the Huayra’s performance, design philosophy, and unique craftsmanship.
added pagani and maserati to readme file

Purpose:
To expand the supercar collection by including the Pagani Huayra — a modern hypercar renowned for its design, engineering, and performance. This enhances the project’s diversity and appeal for automotive enthusiasts.

Next Steps (if applicable):
Ensure pagani.png is added to the pictures directory.
Link this new page to the main index or car listing page for user navigation.

prs.title: Microraptor Details
prs.body:
Summary:
Added a new HTML page microraptor.html to include details about the Microraptor dinosaur. This page follows the same structure and styling as the existing dinosaur detail pages.

Changes Made:
Updated title, headings, and content to describe the Microraptor.
Replaced image with microraptor.png (feathered dinosaur).
Updated profile details (period, diet, location).
Revised description to reflect accurate scientific information.
added Microraptor and Carnotaurus to readme.md

Purpose:
To expand the dinosaur collection with an additional species, improving content variety and completeness of the dinosaur database.

Next Steps (if applicable):
Verify that microraptor.png exists in the pictures directory.


Link this new page to the main index or dinosaur list page for navigation.
